summary: The user sought advice on organizing their bookshelves and incorporating a mid-century modern aesthetic inspired by their mom's armchair. They also discussed their search for a new mattress, leaning towards a hybrid foam-coil model, and requested tips on negotiating prices in-store.
facts: The user moved their old college dorm room desk to the garage last weekend to free up space in their home office. The user is considering adding greenery to their bookshelf and is looking for low-maintenance plants that fit a mid-century modern aesthetic. The user is researching and testing different mattress models at a local mattress store, leaning towards a hybrid foam-coil model. The user has an old mattress that is about 7 years old and is looking to replace it. The user is interested in negotiating the price of a mattress when purchasing in-store.
